flowers.title: Midnight Garden
flowers.desc: A spellbinding bouquet of indigo delphiniums, silvery moonlit eucalyptus, and deep violet lisianthus. This enchanting arrangement evokes the mysterious beauty of a midnight garden under starlit skies.

flowers.title: Sunlit Italian Meadow
flowers.desc: Capture the golden warmth of Tuscany with a radiant bouquet of sunny chamomile, vivid wild poppies, blue cornflowers, and fragrant sprigs of Italian greenery. A breath of countryside bliss.

flowers.title: Velvet Twilight
flowers.desc: A sumptuous nocturne of velvety burgundy peonies, plum dahlias, and soft blue thistle, artfully woven with dusky foliage. This bouquet evokes the allure and mystery of evening's embrace.

flowers.title: Urban Jungle
flowers.desc: A striking collision of glossy monstera leaves and neon pink protea, accented with fresh orchids and vibrant bromeliads. This bold bouquet radiates modern city energy and tropical intensity

flowers.title: Cobalt Currentse
flowers.desc: Ride the waves with this striking bouquet of ocean-hued hydrangeas, deep blue delphiniums, and sculptural sea holly, evoking the tranquil majesty of the open sea.

flowers.title: Enchanted Garden
flowers.desc: A vibrant cascade of fuchsia orchids, peonies, and wild clematis entwined with lush, leafy vines. This bouquet evokes the untamed beauty and intrigue of a secret garden getaway.

flowers.title: Luminous Chartreuse
flowers.desc: Brilliant chartreuse cymbidium orchids and gossamer hydrangea shine boldly among a sea of deep purple anemones and midnight lisianthus. An electrifying bouquet full of energy and aristocratic allure.

flowers.title: Woodland Whimsy
flowers.desc: A magical bouquet featuring petite white spray roses, dainty waxflowers, vibrant moss, and enchanting faux mushrooms, evoking the enchanting realm of woodland sprites and secret forest clearings.

flowers.title: Enchanted Lunar Landscape
flowers.desc: A celestial bouquet of snowy white peonies, silvery brunia, pale blue hydrangea, and shimmering eucalyptus creates a dreamscape worthy of moonlit nights and enchanted wishes.

flowers.title: Monochrome Minimalism
flowers.desc: A striking interplay of crisp white orchids, black calla lilies, and sculptural anthurium, this bouquet transforms the essence of modern art into a bold, graphic floral statement.

flowers.title: Japandi Serenity
flowers.desc: A tranquil composition of creamy magnolia blooms and artfully arranged linear branches, accented with soft greenery. This bouquet embodies minimalism and calm, inspired by the refined Japandi aesthetic.

flowers.title: Futurist Chrome
flowers.desc: A strikingly modern arrangement featuring gleaming metallic-silver leaves, electric blue anthuriums, and sculptural white orchids—evoking avant-garde elegance and the bold allure of tomorrow.

flowers.title: Golden Hour
flowers.desc: Glowing amber roses and sunlit wheat spikes mingle with soft golden ranunculus and textured grasses, capturing the warmth and glow of magic hour in an elegant, sun-kissed bouquet.

flowers.title: Quiet Nostalgia
flowers.desc: Soft, faded pink garden roses and blush ranunculus mingle with airy sprays of lacy Queen Anne's lace, creating a tender bouquet that gently evokes wistful, vintage memories.

flowers.title: Sun-Drenched Desert
flowers.desc: Capture the spirit of arid elegance with ochre garden roses, sculptural succulents, and textured cacti accents, evoking endless sunbeams and the rugged beauty of the desert in bloom.

flowers.title: Chinoiserie Dreams
flowers.desc: A graceful fusion of delicate cherry blossoms, sapphire-hued hydrangeas, and porcelain blue delphiniums evokes the timeless elegance of hand-painted chinoiserie. A bouquet brimming with artful sophistication.

flowers.title: Retro Mod Bouquet
flowers.desc: A bold celebration of pop-art style, this bouquet features vibrant dahlias, striking graphic mums, and playful accents in electric pink, citrus orange, and lemon yellow. The ultimate statement piece.

flowers.title: Firelight Embrace
flowers.desc: Rich wine-hued peonies and smoldering copper foliage unite in this luxurious bouquet, echoing the golden glow and warmth of a firelit evening. Bold, romantic, utterly captivating.

flowers.title: Renaissance Tapestry
flowers.desc: An opulent bouquet of velvety red garden roses, burgundy peonies, and golden-hued ranunculus, elegantly wrapped with gold brocade ribbon—evoking the grandeur and artistry of a Renaissance masterpiece.

flowers.title: Winter Solstice
flowers.desc: A luminous bouquet of icy blue hydrangeas, white roses, and silvery frosted pine, evoking the hushed elegance and shimmering calm of the longest winter night.
